Hello veryeveryone, My name is saurabh kumar and I am from patna, Bihar.
Currently, I am pursuing B.Tech CSE from LPU, jalandhar, punjab.
I am doing my specializing in Full stack developer and current i have  maked a project on pg listing platform which i named as basera.
basically, it is a Pg listing platform where we can add and watch rental listing and can contact owner directly through whatsapp.
I
If i say honestly i do not know that where i will be in next 5 yera due to for now i want to focus on my present activites and built my self diffrentlyiwant to learning diffrent things.

yeah done with a regularization, if i had to explain like what i regualarization then, whenever we train a model for a significant amount of epochs or more on data that it learns noisy part too this lead to an overfitting and model does not behave well on overfittest datasets so, to overcome this method, we use regularization to prevent overfitting, there are two types of normally we used L1 and L2 , L1 pushes the weights to exactly zero tending to giv emore sparse weights dsitributo nwhereas L2 moves weights to zero not exactly zero.
utjaso where was i yeah i was telling that from last 5 days i have been going too library and studying the thing which i almost hated it because i couldn't complete it .

I don't know how to say because from last 5-6 days i am witnessing a new version of me, since starting of my college day i never intended to visit a library to learn something deeply when i see people going to library it's kind of fascinating that the picture you draw in your mind someone learning deeply in library and that makes you or force you to think that from tomorrow onwards i will also go to library, but it never happened until, one random day I decided to go library to complete one thing I hate am been trying to do for long time, that is Maths, chain rule, product rule, partial derivative. all this so i go to that day and next thing story onto next thing.

and after that when i started to undertand I don't know but things really starte to connect and it was like i want to learn forever non stop and that felling hardly felt in my mind dince college was started because i always used to see time and when it ends but yesterday it was something else, and then I remebred someone saying if you want to buy things without looking at price tag then you have to look at twork at wothout worrying about time.
